MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant Doordash's Motion to Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Doordash's Motion to Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice is GRANTED.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.
